resources.string: Please enter a valid server address
Maximum number of connections was reached, Currently used for RTSP only!
Device uses A/V output device but the content license does not allow it. Playback stopped
Device is rooted/jailbroken, DRM not secure!
Rate & Review on the Play Store
Action clicked. Implement your own handler.
Sorry, this action is not possible for the moment
Upgrade file is missing. Cancelling upgrade
Can not do this action in Favorite category
Failed to get Cast context. Try updating Google Play Services and restart the app.
Image displayed while the cast receiver is playing an ad
Current position is at the head of the live stream
Most probably your time is not synched, Please check automatic date & time!
"Please drop the key at the front desk"
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Jeni i sigurte qe doni ta fshini kete kanal?
Copyright © 2018 TiBO IPTV, all rights reserved
Let Google help apps determine location. This means sending anonymous location data to Google, even when no apps are running.
A Daydream-ready phone is required. Visit the Daydream Help Center for more information.
Get the Cardboard app in order to configure your viewer.
This application may not work properly without enabling Google VR Services, please enable this in phone Settings before continuing.
This application may not work properly without Google VR Services. Please install Google VR Services from the Play Store before continuing.
Do you want to schedule this program ?
IMA does not support offline ads
This app does not support downloading live content
This demo app does not support downloading playlists
This demo app only supports downloading http streams
Protected content not supported on API levels below 18
This device does not support the required DRM scheme
This Channel does not support CatchUp
This category is empty, showing all channels
Protected content not supported on API levels below 18
DRM content not supported on API levels below 18
This device does not support the required DRM scheme
This device does not provide a decoder for
No DRM for the required scheme found
This device does not provide a secure decoder for
Media includes audio tracks, but none are playable by this device
Media includes video tracks, but none are playable by this device
Please, enter your username to reset your password
Your PIN will be send to you by email. Are you sure you want to do this?
Playing sample without ads, as the IMA extension was not loaded
Media controls hidden, press d-pad to show
This library allows you to include vector icons everywhere in your project. No limits are given. Scale with no limit, use any Color at any time, provide a contour, and many additional customizations

Material Design Iconic Font is a full suite of material design icons (created and maintained by Google) with additional community-designed and brands icons for easy scalable vector graphics on websites or desktop
You have to login first to view this program!
Please login to Play Store to rate us.
You are logged in another device. You cannot login unless you logout from the other device first
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Please check your connection then try again
There was a parsing problem!! Please check for any null value or wrong date format!!
There may be problems because endtime is before starttime in
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Make sure you are connected to a network
There was a network problem. Please try again
No internet connection, please check your settings
No suitable app to handle link
This version is outdated! Please wait for update
View the ad you saved when you were offline
"You'll get a notification with the link when you're back online"
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Minimum six characters required in password field
Username should be in A1–1–1 format!
Permission to access Phone state was denied, please go to App Settings to Grant
your PIN be sent to your personal email. Want to proceed?
Place your phone into your Cardboard viewer
Place your phone into your %s viewer
Please update your device Date and Time
Checking the internet connection, please wait..
Please connect the device to internet
A problem occurred, please try again later.
is starting now. Do you want to watch it?
Tittle and Stream can not be empty!
The fields can not be empty!
Confirm User and check your email
Your reset password request is send to your email
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
One or more sample lists failed to load
The scheduled program is starting now, what would you like to do?
Your account was created. A confirmation link has been sent to your email address.
"Don't have an account already? Sign Up now!"
Sort From A to Z is empty
Spaces are not allowed in this field!
Permission to access storage was denied

"This software and its related services are provided under license by VisualOn, Inc.
© 2012 VisualOn, Inc. All Rights Reserved. http://www.visualon.com"
Input streaming URL address or file path.
If Checked, deblock on decoding H264 is disabled; else deblock is enabled
Please input HLS max bit rate(bps), 0 present not limited
If Checked, make the application run at max performance
Java render, C render, Native window
Select a subtitle from the following
Select a url from the following
Set RTSP default connection type: TCP or UDP?
Select threads count used to decode
If Checked, use RGB8888 as pixels format; else use RGB565
If Checked, video surface render is enabled; else java render will be used
No programs or channels found. Check your connection.
Phone number must not be null!
By signing up you agree to the terms of service and privacy policy
Playing without ads, as ads are not supported in playlists
"Video can't be played because of missing stream."
No Similar Movies are currently available.
There was a problem receiving channel number
Username should contain only numbers and letters!
Network error, please try again later
